text: vayehi acharey movt shaul vedavid shav mehakovt et-ha'amaleq vayeshev david betsiqelag yamim shenayim
vayehi ׀ bayovm hashelishi vehine ish ba min-hamachane me'im shaul uvegadayv qeru'im vaadama 'al-roshov vayehi bevoov el-david vayipol aretsa vayishetachu
vayomer lov david ey mize tavov vayomer elayv mimachane yiserael nimelateti
vayomer elayv david meh-haya hadavar haged-na li vayomer asher-nas ha'am min-hamilechama vegam-harebe nafal min-ha'am vayamutu vegam shaul vihovnatan benov metu
vayomer david el-hana'ar hamagid lov eykh yada'eta ki-met shaul vihovnatan benov
vayomer hana'ar ׀ hamagid lov niqero niqereyti behar hagilebo'a vehine shaul nishe'an 'al-chanitov vehine harekhev uva'aley haparashim hidebiquhu
vayifen acharayv vayireeni vayiqera elay vaomar hineni
vayomer li mi-ata vayomer kh vaomar q elayv 'amaleqi anokhi
vayomer elay 'amad-na 'alay umoteteni ki achazani hashavats ki-khal-'ovd nafeshi bi
vae'emod 'alayv vaamotetehu ki yada'eti ki lo yicheye acharey nifelov vaeqach hanezer ׀ asher 'al-roshov veetse'ada asher 'al-zero'ov vaaviem el-adoni hena
vayachazeq david bivegadov kh bivegadayv q vayiqera'em vegam kal-haanashim asher itov
vayisepedu vayiveku vayatsumu 'ad-ha'arev 'al-shaul ve'al-yehovnatan benov ve'al-'am yehva ve'al-beyt yiserael ki nafelu becharev s
vayomer david el-hana'ar hamagid lov ey mize ata vayomer ben-ish ger 'amaleqi anokhi
vayomer elayv david eykh lo yareta lishelocha yadekha leshachet et-meshicha yehva
vayiqera david leachad mehane'arim vayomer gash pega'-bov vayakehu vayamot
vayomer elayv david dameykha kh damekha q 'al-roshekha ki fikha 'ana vekha lemor anokhi motati et-meshicha yehva s
vayeqonen david et-haqina hazot 'al-shaul ve'al-yehovnatan benov
vayomer lelamed beney-yehuda qashet hine khetuva 'al-sefer hayashar
hatsevi yiserael 'al-bamovteykha chalal eykh nafelu gibovrim
al-tagidu vegat al-tevaseru bechutsot asheqelovn pen-tisemachena benovt pelishetim pen-ta'alozena benovt ha'arelim
harey vagilebo'a al-tal veal-matar 'aleykhem usedey terumot ki sham nige'al magen gibovrim magen shaul beli mashicha bashamen
midam chalalim mechelev gibovrim qeshet yehovnatan lo nasovg achovr vecherev shaul lo tashuv reyqam
shaul vihovnatan haneehavim vehane'imim bechayeyhem uvemovtam lo niferadu minesharim qalu mearayovt gaveru
benovt yiserael el-shaul bekheyna hamalebishekhem shani 'im-'adanim hama'ale 'adi zahav 'al levushekhen
eykh nafelu giborim betovkh hamilechama yehovnatan 'al-bamovteykha chalal
tsar-li 'aleykha achi yehovnatan na'ameta li meod nifeleata ahavatekha li meahavat nashim
eykh nafelu gibovrim vayovedu keley milechama f
vayehi acharey-khen vayisheal david bayhva ׀ lemor hae'ele beachat 'arey yehuda vayomer yehva elayv 'ale vayomer david ana e'ele vayomer cheverona
vaya'al sham david vegam shetey nashayv achino'am hayizere'elit vaavigayil eshet naval hakaremeli
vaanashayv asher-'imov he'ela david ish uveytov vayeshevu be'arey cheverovn
vayavou aneshey yehuda vayimeshechu-sham et-david lemelekh 'al-beyt yehuda vayagidu ledavid lemor aneshey yaveysh gile'ad asher qaveru et-shaul s
vayishelach david maleakhim el-aneshey yaveysh gile'ad vayomer aleyhem berukhim atem layhva asher 'asitem hachesed haze 'im-adoneykhem 'im-shaul vatiqeberu otov
ve'ata ya'as-yehva 'imakhem chesed veemet vegam anokhi e'ese itekhem hatovva hazot asher 'asitem hadavar haze
ve'ata ׀ techezaqena yedeykhem viheyu liveney-chayil ki-met adoneykhem shaul vegam-oti mashechu veyt-yehuda lemelekh 'aleyhem f
veavener ben-ner sar-tsava asher leshaul laqach et-ish boshet ben-shaul vaya'avirehu machanayim
vayamelikhehu el-hagile'ad veel-haashuri veel-yizere'el ve'al-eferayim ve'al-bineyamin ve'al-yiserael kulo f
ben-areba'im shana ish-boshet ben-shaul bemalekhov 'al-yiserael ushetayim shanim malakh akh beyt yehuda hayu acharey david
vayehi misepar hayamim asher haya david melekh becheverovn 'al-beyt yehuda sheva' shanim veshisha chodashim s
vayetse avener ben-ner ve'avedey ish-boshet ben-shaul mimachanayim give'ovna
veyovav ben-tseruya ve'avedey david yatseu vayifegeshum 'al-berekhat give'ovn yachedav vayeshevu ele 'al-haberekha mize veele 'al-haberekha mize
vayomer avener el-yovav yaqumu na hane'arim visachaqu lefaneynu vayomer yovav yaqumu
vayaqumu vaya'averu vemisepar sheneym 'asar levineyamin uleish boshet ben-shaul usheneym 'asar me'avedey david
vayachaziqu ish ׀ berosh re'ehu vecharebov betsad re'ehu vayipelu yachedav vayiqera lamaqovm hahu cheleqat hatsurim asher begive'ovn
vatehi hamilechama qasha 'ad-meod bayovm hahu vayinagef avener veaneshey yiserael lifeney 'avedey david
vayiheyu-sham shelosha beney tseruya yovav vaavishay va'asahel va'asahel qal beragelayv keachad hatsevayim asher basade
vayiredof 'asahel acharey avener velo-nata lalekhet 'al-hayamin ve'al-hasemovl meacharey avener
vayifen avener acharayv vayomer haata ze 'asahel vayomer anokhi
vayomer lov avener nete lekha 'al-yeminekha ov 'al-semolekha veechoz lekha echad mehane'arim veqach-lekha et-chalitsatov velo-ava 'asahel lasur meacharayv
vayosef 'ovd avener lemor el-'asahel sur lekha meacharay lama akeka aretsa veeykh esa fanay el-yovav achikha

vayemaen lasur vayakehu avener beacharey hachanit el-hachomesh vatetse hachanit meacharayv vayipal-sham vayamat tachatov kh tachetayv q vayehi kal-haba el-hamaqovm asher-nafal sham 'asahel vayamot vaya'amodu
vayiredefu yovav vaavishay acharey avener vehashemesh baa vehema bau 'ad-give'at ama asher 'al-peney-gicha derekh midebar give'ovn
vayiteqabetsu veney-vineyamin acharey avener vayiheyu laaguda echat vaya'amedu 'al rosh-give'a echat
vayiqera avener el-yovav vayomer halanetsach tokhal cherev halov yada'eta ki-mara tiheye baacharovna ve'ad-matay lo-tomar la'am lashuv meacharey acheyhem
vayomer yovav chay haelohim ki lule dibareta ki az mehaboqer na'ala ha'am ish meacharey achiv
vayiteqa' yovav bashovfar vaya'amedu kal-ha'am velo-yiredefu 'ovd acharey yiserael velo-yasefu 'ovd lehilachem
veavener vaanashayv halekhu ba'arava kol halayela hahu vaya'averu et-hayareden vayelekhu kal-habiterovn vayavou machanayim
veyovav v meacharey avener vayiqebots et-kal-ha'am vayipaqedu me'avedey david tishe'ah-'asar ish va'asah-el ׃
ve'avedey david hiku mibineyamin uveaneshey avener shelosh-meovt veshishim ish metu
vayiseu et-'asahel vayiqeberuhu beqever aviv asher beyt lachem vayelekhu khal-halayela yovav vaanashayv vayeor lahem becheverovn
vatehi hamilechama aruka beyn beyt shaul uveyn beyt david vedavid holekh vechazeq uveyt shaul holekhim vedalim s
vayeledu kh vayivaledu q ledavid banim becheverovn vayehi vekhovrov amenovn laachino'am hayizere'elit
umishenehu khileav laavigel kh laavigayil q eshet naval hakaremeli vehashelishi aveshalovm ben-ma'akha bat-talemay melekh geshur
veharevi'i adoniya ven-chagit vehachamishi shefateya ven-avital
vehashishi yitere'am le'egela eshet david ele yuledu ledavid becheverovn f
vayehi biheyovt hamilechama beyn beyt shaul uveyn beyt david veavener haya mitechazeq beveyt shaul
uleshaul pilegesh ushemah ritsepa vat-aya vayomer el-avener madu'a bata el-pilegesh avi

vayichar leavener meod 'al-diverey ish-boshet vayomer harosh kelev anokhi asher lihuda hayovm e'eseh-chesed 'im-beyt ׀ shaul avikha el-echayv veel-mere'ehu velo himetsitikha beyad-david vatifeqod 'alay 'aon haisha hayovm
koh-ya'ase elohim leavener vekho yosif lov ki kaasher nisheba' yehva ledavid ki-khen e'eseh-lov
leha'avir hamamelakha mibeyt shaul ulehaqim et-kise david 'al-yiserael ve'al-yehuda midan ve'ad-beer shava'
velo-yakhol 'ovd lehashiv et-avener davar miyireatov otov s
vayishelach avener maleakhim ׀ el-david tachatov kh tachetayv q lemor lemi-arets lemor kareta veritekha iti vehine yadi 'imakh lehasev eleykha et-kal-yiserael
vayomer tovv ani ekherot itekha berit akh davar echad anokhi shoel meitekha lemor lo-tiree et-panay ki ׀ im-lifeney heviakha et mikhal bat-shaul bevoakha lireovt et-panay s
vayishelach david maleakhim el-ish-boshet ben-shaul lemor tena et-isheti et-mikhal asher eraseti li bemea 'arelovt pelishetim
vayishelach ish boshet vayiqacheha me'im ish me'im paletiel ben lush kh layish q
vayelekh itah ishah halovkh uvakho achareyha 'ad-bachurim vayomer elayv avener lekh shuv vayashov
udevar-avener haya 'im-ziqeney yiserael lemor gam-temovl gam-shileshom heyitem mevaqeshim et-david lemelekh 'aleykhem
ve'ata 'asu ki yehva amar el-david lemor beyad ׀ david 'avedi hovshi'a et-'ami yiserael miyad pelishetim umiyad kal-oyeveyhem
vayedaber gam-avener beazeney vineyamin vayelekh gam-avener ledaber beazeney david becheverovn et kal-asher-tovv be'eyney yiserael uve'eyney kal-beyt bineyamin
vayavo avener el-david cheverovn veitov 'eserim anashim vaya'as david leavener velaanashim asher-itov mishete
vayomer avener el-david aquma ׀ veelekha veeqebetsa el-adoni hamelekh et-kal-yiserael veyikheretu itekha berit umalakheta bekhol asher-teave nafeshekha vayeshalach david et-avener vayelekh beshalovm
vehine 'avedey david veyovav ba mehagedud veshalal rav 'imam heviu veavener eynenu 'im-david becheverovn ki shilechov vayelekh beshalovm
veyovav vekhal-hatsava asher-itov bau vayagidu leyovav lemor ba-avener ben-ner el-hamelekh vayeshalechehu vayelekh beshalovm
vayavo yovav el-hamelekh vayomer me 'asita hineh-va avener eleykha lamah-ze shilachetov vayelekh halovkh
yada'eta et-avener ben-ner ki lefatotekha ba velada'at et-movtsaakha veet mivovekha kh movvaekha q velada'at et kal-asher ata 'ose
vayetse yovav me'im david vayishelach maleakhim acharey avener vayashivu otov mibovr hasira vedavid lo yada'
vayashav avener cheverovn vayatehu yovav el-tovkh hasha'ar ledaber itov basheli vayakehu sham hachomesh vayamat bedam 'asah-el achiv
vayishema' david meacharey khen vayomer naqi anokhi umamelakheti me'im yehva 'ad-'ovlam midemey avener ben-ner
yachulu 'al-rosh yovav veel kal-beyt aviv veal-yikaret mibeyt yovav zav umetsora' umachaziq bapelekh venofel bacherev vachasar-lachem
veyovav vaavishay achiv haregu leavener 'al asher hemit et-'asahel achihem begive'ovn bamilechama f
vayomer david el-yovav veel-kal-ha'am asher-itov qire'u vigedeykhem vechigeru saqim vesifedu lifeney avener vehamelekh david holekh acharey hamita
vayiqeberu et-avener becheverovn vayisa hamelekh et-qovlov vayevek el-qever avener vayiveku kal-ha'am f
vayeqonen hamelekh el-avener vayomar hakemovt naval yamut avener
yadekha lo-asurovt verageleykha lo-linechushetayim hugashu kinefovl lifeney veney-'avela nafaleta vayosifu khal-ha'am livekovt 'alayv
vayavo khal-ha'am lehaverovt et-david lechem be'ovd hayovm vayishava' david lemor ko ya'aseh-li elohim vekho yosif ki im-lifeney vov-hashemesh ete'am-lechem ov khal-meuma
vekhal-ha'am hikiru vayitav be'eyneyhem kekhol asher 'asa hamelekh be'eyney khal-ha'am tovv
vayede'u khal-ha'am vekhal-yiserael bayovm hahu ki lo hayeta mehamelekh lehamit et-avener ben-ner f
vayomer hamelekh el-'avadayv halov tede'u ki-sar vegadovl nafal hayovm haze beyiserael
veanokhi hayovm rakh umashucha melekh vehaanashim haele beney tseruya qashim mimeni yeshalem yehva le'ose hara'a kera'atov f
vayishema' ben-shaul ki met avener becheverovn vayirepu yadayv vekhal-yiserael nivehalu
usheney anashim sarey-gedudim hayu ven-shaul shem haechad ba'ana veshem hasheni rekhav beney rimovn habeeroti mibeney vineyamin ki gam-beerovt techashev 'al-bineyamin
vayiverechu habeerotim gitayema vayiheyu-sham garim 'ad hayovm haze s
velihovnatan ben-shaul ben nekhe ragelayim ben-chamesh shanim haya bevo shemu'at shaul vihovnatan miyizere'el vatisaehu omanetov vatanos vayehi bechafezah lanus vayipol vayipasecha ushemov mefivoshet
vayelekhu beney-rimovn habeeroti rekhav uva'ana vayavou kechom hayovm el-beyt ish boshet vehu shokhev et mishekav hatsahorayim
vehena bau 'ad-tovkh habayit loqechey chitim vayakuhu el-hachomesh verekhav uva'ana achiv nimelatu
vayavou habayit vehu-shokhev 'al-mitatov bachadar mishekavov vayakuhu vayemituhu vayasiru et-roshov vayiqechu et-roshov vayelekhu derekh ha'arava kal-halayela

vayaviu et-rosh ish-boshet el-david cheverovn vayomeru el-hamelekh hineh-rosh ish-boshet ben-shaul oyivekha asher biqesh et-nafeshekha vayiten yehva ladoni hamelekh neqamovt hayovm haze mishaul umizare'ov s
vaya'an david et-rekhav ׀ veet-ba'ana achiv beney rimovn habeeroti vayomer lahem chay-yehva asher-pada et-nafeshi mikal-tsara
ki hamagid li lemor hineh-met shaul vehu-haya khimevaser be'eynayv vaochaza vov vaeheregehu betsiqelag asher letiti-lov besora
af ki-anashim resha'im haregu et-ish-tsadiq beveytov 'al-mishekavov ve'ata halov avaqesh et-damov miyedekhem uvi'areti etekhem min-haarets
vayetsav david et-hane'arim vayaharegum vayeqatsetsu et-yedeyhem veet-rageleyhem vayitelu 'al-haberekha becheverovn veet rosh ish-boshet laqachu vayiqeberu veqever-avener becheverovn f
vayavou kal-shivetey yiserael el-david cheverovna vayomeru lemor hinenu 'atsemekha uvesarekha anachenu

gam-etemovl gam-shileshovm biheyovt shaul melekh 'aleynu ata hayita kh hayita q movtsi kh hamovtsi q vehamevi kh vehamevi q et-yiserael vayomer yehva lekha ata tire'e et-'ami et-yiserael veata tiheye lenagid 'al-yiserael
vayavou kal-ziqeney yiserael el-hamelekh cheverovna vayikherot lahem hamelekh david berit becheverovn lifeney yehva vayimeshechu et-david lemelekh 'al-yiserael f
ben-sheloshim shana david bemalekhov areba'im shana malakh
becheverovn malakh 'al-yehuda sheva' shanim veshisha chodashim uvirushalaim malakh sheloshim veshalosh shana 'al kal-yiserael vihuda
vayelekh hamelekh vaanashayv yerushalaim el-hayevusi yovshev haarets vayomer ledavid lemor lo-tavov hena ki im-hesirekha ha'iverim vehapisechim lemor lo-yavov david hena
vayilekod david et metsudat tsiyovn hi 'ir david
vayomer david bayovm hahu kal-make yevusi veyiga' batsinovr veet-hapisechim veet-ha'iverim senov kh senuey q nefesh david 'al-ken yomeru 'iver ufisecha lo yavov el-habayit
vayeshev david bametsuda vayiqera-lah 'ir david vayiven david saviv min-hamilov vavayeta
vayelekh david halovkh vegadovl vayhva elohey tsevaovt 'imov f
vayishelach chiram melekhe-tsor maleakhim el-david va'atsey arazim vecharashey 'ets vecharashey even qir vayivenu-vayit ledavid
vayeda' david ki-hekhinov yehva lemelekh 'al-yiserael vekhi nise mamelakhetov ba'avur 'amov yiserael s
vayiqach david 'ovd pilageshim venashim mirushalaim acharey boov mecheverovn vayivaledu 'ovd ledavid banim uvanovt
veele shemovt hayilodim lov birushalaim shamu'a veshovvav venatan ushelomo
veyivechar veelishu'a venefeg veyafi'a
veelishama' veeleyada' veelifalet f
vayisheme'u felishetim ki-mashechu et-david lemelekh 'al-yiserael vaya'alu khal-pelishetim levaqesh et-david vayishema' david vayered el-hametsuda
ufelishetim bau vayinateshu be'emeq refaim
vayisheal david bayhva lemor hae'ele el-pelishetim hatitenem beyadi vayomer yehva el-david 'ale ki-naton eten et-hapelishetim beyadekha
vayavo david beva'al-peratsim vayakem sham david vayomer parats yehva et-oyevay lefanay keferets mayim 'al-ken qara shem-hamaqovm hahu ba'al peratsim
vaya'azevu-sham et-'atsabeyhem vayisaem david vaanashayv f
vayosifu 'ovd pelishetim la'alovt vayinateshu be'emeq refaim
vayisheal david bayhva vayomer lo ta'ale hasev el-achareyhem uvata lahem mimul bekhaim
vihi beshame'akha kh keshame'akha q et-qovl tse'ada berashey habekhaim az techerats ki az yatsa yehva lefaneykha lehakovt bemachane felishetim
vaya'as david ken kaasher tsivahu yehva vayakh et-pelishetim migeva' 'ad-boakha gazer f
vayosef 'ovd david et-kal-bachur beyiserael sheloshim alef
vayaqam ׀ vayelekh david vekhal-ha'am asher itov miba'aley yehuda leha'alovt misham et arovn haelohim asher-niqera shem shem yehva tsevaovt yoshev hakeruvim 'alayv
vayarekivu et-arovn haelohim el-'agala chadasha vayisauhu mibeyt avinadav asher bagive'a ve'uza veacheyov beney avinadav nohagim et-ha'agala chadasha
vayisauhu mibeyt avinadav asher bagive'a 'im arovn haelohim veacheyov holekh lifeney haarovn
vedavid ׀ vekhal-beyt yiserael mesachaqim lifeney yehva bekhol 'atsey verovshim uvekhinorovt uvinevalim uvetupim uvimena'ane'im uvetseletselim
vayavou 'ad-goren nakhovn vayishelach 'uza el-arovn haelohim vayochez bov ki shametu habaqar
vayichar-af yehva be'uza vayakehu sham haelohim 'al-hashal vayamat sham 'im arovn haelohim
vayichar ledavid 'al asher parats yehva perets be'uza vayiqera lamaqovm hahu perets 'uza 'ad hayovm haze
vayira david et-yehva bayovm hahu vayomer eykh yavov elay arovn yehva
velo-ava david lehasir elayv et-arovn yehva 'al-'ir david vayatehu david beyt 'oved-edovm hagiti
vayeshev arovn yehva beyt 'oved edom hagiti shelosha chodashim vayevarekh yehva et-'oved edom veet-kal-beytov
vayugad lamelekh david lemor berakh yehva et-beyt 'oved edom veet-kal-asher-lov ba'avur arovn haelohim vayelekh david vaya'al et-arovn haelohim mibeyt 'oved edom 'ir david besimecha
vayehi ki tsa'adu noseey arovn-yehva shisha tse'adim vayizebach shovr umeri
vedavid mekhareker bekhal-'oz lifeney yehva vedavid chagur efovd bad
vedavid vekhal-beyt yiserael ma'alim et-arovn yehva biteru'a uveqovl shovfar
vehaya arovn yehva ba 'ir david umikhal bat-shaul nisheqefa ׀ be'ad hachalovn vatere et-hamelekh david mefazez umekhareker lifeney yehva vativez lov belibah
vayaviu et-arovn yehva vayatsigu otov bimeqovmov betovkh haohel asher natah-lov david vaya'al david 'olovt lifeney yehva ushelamim
vayekhal david meha'alovt ha'ovla vehashelamim vayevarekh et-ha'am beshem yehva tsevaovt
vayechaleq lekhal-ha'am lekhal-hamovn yiserael lemeish ve'ad-isha leish chalat lechem achat veeshepar echad vaashisha echat vayelekh kal-ha'am ish leveytov
vayashav david levarekh et-beytov vatetse mikhal bat-shaul liqerat david vatomer mah-nikhebad hayovm melekh yiserael asher nigela hayovm le'eyney amehovt 'avadayv kehigalovt nigelovt achad hareqim
vayomer david el-mikhal lifeney yehva asher bachar-bi meavikh umikal-beytov letsaot oti nagid 'al-'am yehva 'al-yiserael vesichaqeti lifeney yehva
uneqaloti 'ovd mizot vehayiti shafal be'eynay ve'im-haamahovt asher amaret 'imam ikaveda
ulemikhal bat-shaul lo-haya lah yaled 'ad yovm movtah f
vayehi ki-yashav hamelekh beveytov vayhva henicha-lov misaviv mikal-oyevayv
vayomer hamelekh el-natan hanavi ree na anokhi yovshev beveyt arazim vaarovn haelohim yoshev betovkh hayeri'a
vayomer natan el-hamelekh kol asher bilevavekha lekh 'ase ki yehva 'imakh s
vayehi balayela hahu vayehi devar-yehva el-natan lemor
lekh veamareta el-'avedi el-david ko amar yehva haata tiveneh-li vayit leshiveti
